evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for SLA breach detection.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to trigger detection when an SLA is breached. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete SLA definitions or mechanisms that would confirm the existence of such detection. The linked use case mentions the need for SLA definitions but lacks specific data or endpoints to validate this requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No concrete SLA definitions (arrival windows, max wait, completion windows) provided.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
